name: @rayspec/local-boot
description: DEV-ONLY generic, spec-driven local backend-boot wrapper. A thin wrapper over @rayspec/server (the supported LOCAL boot) parameterized by RAYSPEC_SPEC_PATH: provisions a fresh dev DB, injects the spec, runs the REAL deploy() pipeline, registers product tables, wires each declared agent's backend from env, and serves any declarative spec (stores + CRUD api + agents) over curl. Lives OUTSIDE packages/ — zero product code in the platform. Local/internal-only: the external-exposure hardening layer gates untrusted traffic.
